Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Anybody see the Obama Deception?

Social · asked by user [] · 2009-04-16 · 3 answers
Im likely to take this with a grain of salt, but a lot of the stuff said in the movie is verifiable, and I do believe we need to get rid of the Federal Reserve.

Im just curious on what devotees think of this.
user [2] · 2009-04-16
Federal Reserve is a private institution controlling the money printout, thus the economy, thus the real political power. USA Government just plays by its music. It all came about when gold standard was abolished to ease the printing of dollars for war campaigns.
see text attached for Srila Prabhupada conversation on the topic
user [149] · 2009-04-16
There is a documentary "The Money Masters," which has a very good outline of the history of the Reserve Bank and banking practices in general. It is available online for purchase, or you can watch it in parts on youtube.
user [2] · 2009-04-17
look what happens to the leaders that do want peace and social justice. like Kennedy [p]
